patch.title: Implement exec.query (Q1–Q10) with evidence-first responses
patch.intent: Enable leaders to ask status questions in chat and receive concise evidence-backed answers.
definition_of_done: Implements ON_TRACK, BLOCKERS, CHANGED_SINCE, NEXT_7_DAYS, TOP_RISKS, RECENT_DECISIONS, FAILED_ATTEMPTS, RISKIEST_ASSUMPTION, WHERE_RUNNING_ACCESS, RESUME_IN_30
Each response includes confidence + evidence refs
